decision_commentary: Completeness 5: design_set_status='complete'; concept_reflection_confirmed=true; area_program_compliance confirmed with deviations=[] and detailed notes; structural_coordination_notes present and specific (raft foundation, concrete frame, MEP coordination). All 11 space types from area program reflected per notes. COFEPRIS NOM compliance per space confirmed. All 6 engineering disciplines initiated listed. Accuracy 5: no unexplained departures from approved concept — clean/dirty corridor separation maintained, consultorios exceed COFEPRIS minimum (designed 20 sqm vs 15 sqm minimum). Urgencias 120 sqm meets COFEPRIS requirements. COFEPRIS pre-consultation completed at Phase 2 as required. Clarity 5: design is complete for engineering handoff — no open design questions, all 6 engineering disciplines initiated with coordination status. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: architectural design delivered before Emilio's engineering phase (DG-08 timestamp 2026-07-30, Phase 3 start date 2026-07-30 — same day, correct). Decision_readiness 5: Marcela can hand off to Emilio immediately. Auto-fail: no rooms missing from area program — PASS; concept reflected — PASS; structural coordination notes present — PASS.
celia_routing_notes: DG-08: decision=approve, route_to=Emilio (coordinate structural and systems engineering including medical gas and specialized HVAC). All 11 payload fields present.
